summary: Full e2e testing of Deep Green Energy landing page. All 6 backend pytest cases passed (root, lead create valid/invalid phone, list leads no _id leak, stats, eligibility_modal source). All critical frontend flows verified via Playwright: landing load, header/hero/subsidy/lead-form rendering, EN->HI language switch (पीएम सूर्य घर rendered), Eligibility modal 4-step flow with submit -> success state, Get-a-Free-Quote scrolls to #contact, lead form invalid-phone toast + valid submission success, Apply Now & Subsidy CTA scroll to contact.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description / aria-describedby for DialogContent (a11y warning, non-blocking). Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to suppress.

action_items: Optional a11y polish: add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby={undefined}) to EligibilityModal DialogContent to silence Radix warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: lead POST excludes _id correctly via response_model=Lead. Phone validator strips non-digits and stores last 10 digits — works as designed.
LeadForm input restricts phone to 10 digits via slice, so submitting <10 triggers client-side toast before reaching API — good UX.

EligibilityModal q3 submits the bucket label (e.g. 'Below ₹1,500') as monthly_bill string — server accepts any <=50 char string. Fine for lead capture, but consider a structured field if analytics needed.
Hero floating badges show static '₹78,000 Max Subsidy' / '30-Yr Warranty' — not translated when lang=hi; minor i18n gap.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed leads via tests (TEST_User, TEST_List, TEST_Elig, TEST_PW_Modal, TEST_PW). Safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_leads.py. All endpoints stable. Frontend uses data-testid pattern across components; eligibility option testids are kebab-cased from option text (works with English; Hindi labels may yield non-ASCII testids — current tests select by index which is robust).
